query: INSERT INTO cards (cardId, name, cardType, rarity, alignment, element, dimension, characterClass, species, faction, cost, power, health, abilityText, flavorText, imageUrl, loredexEntryId, era, season, disciplines, keywords, unlockMethod, isActive) VALUES ('evt-battle-nexon-90016', 'The Battle of Nexon', 'event', 'legendary', 'chaos', 'fire', 'space', 'none', 'unknown', 'Insurgency', 7, 0, 0, 'Total War: All characters in play deal damage equal to their power to a random enemy character. Iron Lion''s Gambit: If Iron Lion is in play, he gains +3/+3 and Indestructible until end of turn. Pyrrhic Victory: After resolution, destroy all characters with 2 or less health.', '"The sky burned for seven days. When it cleared, neither side could claim victory."', 'https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310419663032080159/2quXz2C2n5hMfqc8hNVW3h/battle_of_nexon-FuyTcVR3eMBZFGBribUnyS.png', 'entity_102', 'Age of Privacy', 'Season 1', '["Warfare", "Strategy", "Destruction"]', '["battle", "mass-damage", "war", "legendary-event"]', 'story', 1);

Iron Lion''s Gambit: If Iron Lion is in play, he gains +3/+3 and Indestructible until end of turn.
